2268550.name: Trans Theft Horso
2268550.description:
Adric Belfonté never wanted to go west, but a small task, picking up their brother's hormones, turns into a wild and western fantasy of crime and adventure!

Explore the bewaffling and dangerous west! Defy the admirals, ride the animals, fight the haters, seek the missing, and discover why the medicine routes dried up. The West is full of friends and enemies, of lobsters and monsters, and the two great gee-gees: horses and gender gladness!

A feverish LGBTQ fantasy adventure, in full colour! Go west, young enby! Have fun, and beware!
